overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy riding a horse along a dirt trail through a scenic canyon landscape. The character travels from a narrow rocky passage with a waterfall toward open vistas overlooking a canyon lake, continuing through scrubland terrain under bright midday sun.

events.description: trail opens from rocky canyon passage to reveal wide canyon lake vista as the path curves

agents.ego_description: galloping on horseback along the dirt trail, moving away from the waterfall area toward the open canyon rim

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown cliff face with layered rock strata forming the canyon wall
water cascading down the rock face in the distance
calm blue water visible through the canyon opening
narrow dusty path winding through the terrain
sparse desert shrubs and dry grasses lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a waterfall cascading down red rock cliffs as the character rides along a narrow dirt trail. The path gradually opens up to reveal a stunning canyon lake vista while the horse maintains a steady gallop through the sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic ridge trail overlooking canyon water

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the ridge trail with the canyon lake visible to the left, navigating gentle curves past scattered trees

entered.detail: flat-topped rock formations rising in the distance
thin vertical structure visible on the horizon against the sky
large light-colored rocks scattered beside the trail
layered rock plateaus visible across the canyon

segments.scene_description: Riding along an elevated ridge trail with expansive views of the canyon lake below to the left. The landscape features scattered oak trees and large granite boulders, with a distant metal tower visible on the horizon against the red rock mesas.

scene_state.functional_zone: scrubland trail through dry grass and oak trees

agents.ego_description: riding through increasingly vegetated terrain as the trail curves gently, with the canyon receding into the distance on the left

entered.detail: prominent rocky outcrop emerging from the hillside
thick bushes and dry grass lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the trail continuing through dry scrubland with scattered oak trees and dense bushes lining the path. The canyon lake remains visible in the far distance to the left while red rock outcrops appear on the right, maintaining the rugged Western landscape atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow rocky passage with a waterfall into an expansive, sun-drenched canyon landscape. It begins beside a cascading waterfall on red rock cliffs, moving along a narrow dirt trail that gradually opens to reveal a stunning vista of a canyon lake. As the horse maintains a steady gallop, the scene shifts to an elevated ridge trail where the lake remains visible to the left, flanked by scattered oak trees, granite boulders, and a distant metal tower on the horizon. The path then transitions into dry scrubland with dense bushes lining the way, before finally moving past red rock outcrops on the right while the distant lake fades into the rugged Western backdrop.
